mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipping_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, tag, is_default, is_disabled) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{tag}, #{isDefault}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE shipping_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, tag = #{tag}, is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shipping_address WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shipping_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM shipping_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE shipping_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE shipping_address SET is_disabled = #{isDisabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE shipping_address SET is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id}
